query:
SELECT cu.id, cu.tenantId, cu.email, cu.name, cu.status, t.name as tenantName
FROM crm_users cu 
JOIN tenants t ON t.id = cu.tenantId
WHERE cu.email IN ('bruno@entur.com.br', 'fernando@entur.com.br', 'viviane@entur.com.br')
ORDER BY cu.email, cu.tenantId;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT cu.id, cu.tenantId, cu.email, cu.name, cu.status, t.name as tenantName
FROM crm_users cu 
JOIN tenants t ON t.id = cu.tenantId
WHERE cu.email IN ('bruno@entur.com.br', 'fernando@entur.com.br', 'viviane@entur.com.br')
ORDER BY cu.email, cu.tenantId;
